_comment: PDF field mapping schema. One file per form type. Used in Phase 5 for automated PDF form filling.
_usage: Each key is a PDF form field name (as it appears in the PDF). Each value describes where the data comes from.
form_description: Example resort booking form — replace with actual form field names from your PDF

GuestLastName.description: Guest's last name from booking data

GuestFirstName.description: Guest's first name from booking data

GuestPhone.description: Guest phone — marked N/A per resort policy

GuestEmail.description: Guest email — marked N/A per resort policy

ArrivalDate.description: Check-in date formatted for the form

DepartureDate.description: Check-out date formatted for the form

SiteNumber.description: Resort site number from property config (e.g., 110 for Jay)
